description:
Recover access to the encrypted volume '/home/ga/Volumes/project_alpha_archive.hc'. You are provided a list of potential passwords in '/home/ga/Documents/potential_passwords.txt'. 

1. Try the passwords from the list to mount the volume.
2. Once mounted, copy the file 'Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf' from the volume to '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered/Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf'.
3. Create a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered/correct_password.txt' containing ONLY the password that worked.
4. Dismount the volume when finished.
